---
title: "John Mozley"
---

## John Mozley

**Dates:** (1805-1872)

### Description

publisher

### Biography

A partner in the publishing firm of John and Charles Mozley, he married (1835) Jemima Newman.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 9th 1882
- Letter from Nov: 4. 1863.
- Letter from Novr 24th 1862
- Letter from Jan 22d [1862]
- Letter from March 18th 1861
- Letter from March 28th 1858 [for 1859?]
- Letter from May 26th 1857
- Letter from Sept 29th [1856]
- Letter from July 11th [1856]
- Letter from [March-October 1856?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from April 20th [1854]
- Letter from March 7th [1854]
- Letter from Jany 21st [1854]
- Letter from Jany 16th [1854]
- Letter from Decr 31st [1853]
- Letter from Novr 29th [1853]
- Letter from Nov 8th [1852]
- Letter from Oct 19th [1852]
- Letter from June 10th [1852]
- Letter from May 14, 1848

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
